statusLine.command: input=$(cat); dir=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); remaining=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.remaining_percentage // empty'); branch=$(cd "$dir" 2>/dev/null && git -c core.fileMode=false -c advice.detachedHead=false symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || git -c core.fileMode=false -c advice.detachedHead=false rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null); printf '%s' "$(basename "$dir")"; [ -n "$branch" ] && printf ' (%s)' "$branch"; printf ' | %s' "$model"; [ -n "$remaining" ] && printf ' | Context: %.0f%%' "$remaining"
